summary: Iteration 6 backend-only test of manual UPI payment-request flow + AV recording-chunk upload/playback. 18/18 new tests pass (100%) against https://iit-test-portal.preview.emergentagent.com. All 10 review-request scenarios verified. New regression file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter6_payment_recording.py.

minor.issue: PaymentRequestIn.utr is declared as a required str in models.py:171-177. The route auto-approves free items (amount==0) BEFORE the runtime utr-length check, so the field is functionally optional for free items — but Pydantic still rejects the request (422) if the 'utr' key is omitted entirely. Tests must send utr='' for free items. Recommend making utr Optional[str]='' in the model so the route's runtime validation alone gates UTR presence.

verified_behaviors: POST /api/student/payment-request with paid course + valid UTR -> 200, payment.status='pending', auto_approved=false, course_ids NOT yet on student, my-payments shows pending.
Duplicate UTR (second submission by different student) -> 400 'This UTR has already been submitted'.
Empty UTR for paid item -> 400 'A valid 12-digit UTR / transaction reference is required'.
Free item (price=0): auto_approved=true, status='success', course_ids gained immediately, GET /api/student/courses returns the course.
GET /api/admin/payments?status=pending returns pending payments correctly filtered; non-admin -> 403.
POST /api/admin/payments/{id}/approve -> status='success', approved_at set; student profile course_ids gained; /api/student/courses lists it; /api/student/my-payments shows status='success'.
POST /api/admin/payments/{id}/reject {reason} -> status='rejected', rejection_reason recorded; student does NOT gain access; re-approving rejected -> 400.
POST /api/exams/recording-chunk with small base64 webm -> 200 with {id, at, size_bytes}; data stored in proctor_recordings (data_base64 retrievable by admin).
Chunk with data_base64 length > 2_000_000 chars -> 413 with 'Chunk too large' detail.
GET /api/exams/admin/attempts/{aid}/recording -> 200 list, sorted ascending by 'at', NO data_base64 field, includes id/at/size_bytes metadata.
GET /api/exams/admin/attempts/{aid}/recording/{cid} -> 200 video/webm StreamingResponse; r.content equals original raw bytes (b'fake webm data'*100).
GET /api/public/recording-chunks/{aid} for in_progress attempt -> 404 'Recording not available'.
GET /api/public/recording-chunks/{aid} for submitted attempt -> 200 list with NO data_base64 (no auth header needed).
GET /api/public/recording-chunk/{aid}/{cid} -> 200 video/webm stream (no auth); unknown chunk_id -> 404; unknown attempt_id -> 404.
action_items: Consider relaxing PaymentRequestIn.utr to Optional[str]='' so callers don't need to send utr='' explicitly for free items. The route already handles the empty case correctly post-validation; this is purely a client-friendliness/API-contract nit, not a defect.
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate-UTR guard in routes_student.py:164 only blocks pending/success payments. A previously rejected payment's UTR remains reusable, which is the intended behaviour (user can resubmit a fresh UTR after rejection) — but consider whether a UTR rejected for 'UTR mismatch' should also be considered 'used' to prevent re-attempts with the same number; current logic is fine for the typical resubmit-with-new-UTR flow.

routes_exams.py:594 caps chunk at MAX_CHUNK_B64=2_000_000 chars. A 30s 480p WebM with audio at ~500 kbps is well under that (~2 MB raw -> ~2.7 MB base64), which exceeds 2 MB! Consider raising to ~3_000_000 if real WebM chunks at default bitrate trip the cap, or have the client downscale resolution/bitrate.
models.py:171 PaymentRequestIn.utr is required-str — see action item.

routes_admin.py:304 approve_payment accepts an Optional PaymentDecisionIn body; FastAPI may treat the body as required if Content-Type is application/json without payload. Current tests pass with {'reason': 'verified'} so this is OK, but document that an empty body works too if intended.

Recording chunk binary endpoints in routes_exams.py:633 and routes_public.py:107 set 'inline; filename=chunk-{chunk_index}.webm' — no Cache-Control header. For parent playback over slow networks, consider adding 'Cache-Control: private, max-age=300' so seeking re-fetches don't hammer the API.
test_credentials: admin@gyansai.com / admin123 ; demo / demo123 ; fresh TEST_pay_*/TEST_rec_* students created+deleted per test.
seed_data_creation: Created one TEST Free Course (price=0) and possibly one TEST Paid Course (price=2999) if no paid seeded course was present; both are cleaned up in fixture teardown. Multiple transient students created and deleted. The 'fresh_attempt' fixture creates and submits one new attempt (with 2 recording chunks) against a seeded JEE published exam — the submitted attempt + its recording rows are left in DB (harmless, used for parent playback regression checks).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 added: (1) POST /api/student/payment-request with state machine pending/success/rejected — distinct from legacy /api/student/checkout (pending_utr/awaiting_review/success/rejected) which still exists. The legacy /api/student/payments/{id}/utr + /api/admin/payments/{id}/verify endpoints from iter5 also still function. (2) /api/exams/recording-chunk + admin & public chunk endpoints alongside the existing snapshot endpoints. Recording chunks live in proctor_recordings collection; snapshots live separately. Both iter5 (test_manual_payments.py) and iter6 (test_iter6_payment_recording.py) regression files should be run together for future payment-related work.
